description: A plain scan/screenshot of an official bureaucratic form (a NYC Department of Corrections response to an ICE immigration detainer request), not a designed graphic. The black-on-white document is a fillable government form with header fields: 'Name of individual subject to request: AMATITLA, ROMAN', 'DOB:' (redacted with a black bar), and 'Date & time DOC received request (MM/DD/YYYY) 04/14/2026'. A section titled 'DOCUMENTS RECEIVED FROM ICE/DHS (check all that apply)' lists checkbox items with X marks beside items such as 'Form I-247A (Immigration Detainer - Notice of Action)', 'Form I-247D', 'Form I-247N', 'Judicial warrant', 'Form I-200 (Warrant for Arrest of Alien)', and 'Form I-205 (Warrant of Removal/Deportation)'. Below is a 'PROJECTED DISPOSITION OF REQUEST' section with dense legal paragraphs describing whether the Department of Corrections will honor the detainer, maintain custody, or cooperate with DHS depending on whether a judicial or administrative warrant is provided. The design is purely a form layout with no propaganda styling, photos, seals or slogans. Context (from the tweet): ICE alleges Roman Ceron Amatitla, a Mexican national, was charged with eight counts of murder and arson; the document is offered as evidence that ICE issued a detainer. Marked is_designed=false because it is a routine document scan, though it is used here for messaging/'sanctuary'-criticism purposes.
notable_text: AMATITLA, ROMAN; DOCUMENTS RECEIVED FROM ICE/DHS; PROJECTED DISPOSITION OF REQUEST; Form I-247A Immigration Detainer; Form I-200 Warrant for Arrest of Alien; Form I-205 Warrant of Removal/Deportation
